# PRD: [dream] Promptfolio

> Auto-generated from GitHub issue sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#91
> https://github.com/sethshoultes/shipyard-ai/issues/91

## Metadata
- **Repo:** sethshoultes/shipyard-ai
- **Issue:** #91
- **Author:** sethshoultes
- **Labels:** p1
- **Created:** 2026-04-21T16:13:30Z

## Problem
## Dream Candidate: Promptfolio

**Proposed in 1 dream session(s):**
- `dreams/dream-2026-04-21T00-1-steve.md`

---

### First mention (excerpt)

**Promptfolio**
*A beautiful portfolio generator for AI practitioners*

**What:** A WordPress plugin that generates stunning, Apple-esque portfolio sites showcasing AI prompts, workflows, and case studies. Think "Dribbble meets prompt engineering."

**Why it delights:**
- One-click import from Claude/ChatGPT conversation exports
- Automatic visual hierarchy â€” prompts become hero cards with elegant typography
- Built-in "Try this prompt" widget that lets visitors experience your work
- Dark mode that actually looks good (not just inverted colors)

**User:** AI consultants, prompt engineers, developers showing off AI integrations
**Distribution:** WordPress plugin directory, ProductHunt launch
**Dogfoodable:** Yes â€” we'd use it to showcase Shipyard's work

---

---

*Auto-created by dream-backfill. Promote to PRD in `prds/` to activate.*


## Success Criteria
- Issue sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#91 requirements are met
- All tests pass

content.content:
1â†’# Promptfolio â€” Build Specification
     2â†’
     3â†’**Issue:** sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#91
     4â†’**Source PRD:** `prds/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-91.md`
     5â†’**Locked Decisions:** `rounds/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-91/decisions.md`
     6â†’**Product Name:** Promptfolio (per locked decision #2)
     7â†’**Version:** 1.0 (MVP)
     8â†’**Architecture:** Static SaaS â€” zero backend, no auth, no database
     9â†’
    10â†’---
    11â†’
    12â†’## Goals
    13â†’
    14â†’From the PRD and locked debate decisions:
    15â†’
    16â†’1. **Static SaaS Portfolio Generator** â€” Build a lightweight Node.js-based generator that transforms Claude conversation export JSON files into stunning, gallery-grade portfolio websites. No React SPA, no heavy build pipeline (per locked decision #19).
    17â†’
    18â†’2. **One-Click Claude Import** â€” Single file drop-zone for Claude conversation export JSON ONLY. No ChatGPT, no manual paste in v1 (per locked decision #6).
    19â†’
    20â†’3. **One Sacred Template** â€” Single "dark gallery" template with hero prompt display, elegant typography, and locked design tokens. No theme marketplace, no font picker, no color picker (per locked decision #3).
    21â†’
    22â†’4. **Dark Mode Only** â€” Midnight gallery palette. No light mode toggle, no light-mode styles (per locked decision #4, #16).
    23â†’
    24â†’5. **Auto-Generated OG Images** â€” Every portfolio generates a pre-rendered PNG social card at build time (per locked decision #9).
    25â†’
    26â†’6. **Static CDN-Hosted Pages** â€” Public portfolios served as static HTML/CSS/JS bundles. Zero database reads, zero server-side rendering per-request.
    27â†’
    28â†’7. **30-Second Resurrection Standard** â€” Upload Claude export â†’ instant beautiful URL in under 30 seconds (per locked decision #10).
    29â†’
    30â†’8. **No Forced Watermark** â€” No "Made with Promptfolio" backlinks. Viral loop via organic pride, not obligation (per locked decision #10).
    31â†’
    32â†’9. **No "Try This Prompt" Widget** â€” Explicitly cut. API keys, rate limits, abuse vectors are all liability (per locked decision #5).
    33â†’
    34â†’10. **No Barnacles** â€” Cut SEO wizards, newsletter widgets, popup chatbots, analytics dashboards, onboarding tutorials (per locked decision #14, #17, #18).
    35â†’
    36â†’---
    37â†’
    38â†’## Implementation Approach
    39â†’
    40â†’### Architecture Lock (from decisions.md)
    41â†’
    42â†’| Decision | Resolution |
    43â†’|----------|------------|
    44â†’| **Static SaaS** | One file in (Claude JSON), one URL out, CDN-hosted. No DB, no auth, no server-side rendering in v1. |
    45â†’| **Product Name** | Promptfolio â€” locked in decision #2. |
    46â†’| **No React Pipeline** | No Next.js, no heavy SPA toolchain. Lightweight static generator only (vanilla Node.js, Astro, or 11ty) per decision #19. |
    47â†’| **One Sacred Template** | No theme marketplace. No font picker. No color picker. One midnight gallery palette. |
    48â†’| **Dark Mode Only** | Not a toggle. The air the gallery breathes. |
    49â†’| **Claude Import Only** | ChatGPT, OpenAI, Gemini exports are v2. |
    50â†’| **Client-Side Parsing** | Browser-based parsing with 5 MB cap. Web Workers for off-main-thread processing. |
    51â†’| **OG Images Pre-Generated** | Generate during build pipeline using Sharp or Satori, not edge-rendered per-request. |
    52â†’| **No Forced Watermark** | Beauty must compel sharing. Apostles, not hostages. |
    53â†’| **No Widget** | "Try this prompt" widget is barnacles. |
    54â†’| **Base64 Image Extraction** | Decode base64 images from exports, convert to static files, reference in HTML. |
    55â†’| **Self-Evident Affordance** | No multi-step wizard. Single obvious upload action. One-line helper text max. |
    56â†’
    57â†’### Tech Stack
    58â†’
    59â†’- **Runtime:** Node.js 18+ (native fetch)
    60â†’- **Framework:** None (vanilla Node.js file-writing) OR Astro 4.x (lightweight, no React SPA)
    61â†’- **Styling:** Vanilla CSS with locked design tokens (dark mode only)
    62â†’- **Validation:** Custom schema validation in parser
    63â†’- **OG Images:** Sharp or Satori (SVGâ†’PNG, pre-generated at build time)
    64â†’- **Data Persistence:** None in v1 â€” pure static generation from uploaded JSON
    65â†’- **Deployment:** Cloudflare Pages, Vercel, or Netlify (free tier, instant deploy)
    66â†’
    67â†’### File Structure
    68â†’
    69â†’```
    70â†’/promptfolio
    71â†’â”śâ”€â”€ /src
    72â†’â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ /parser
    73â†’â”‚   â”‚   â””â”€â”€ claude.js        # Claude export JSON â†’ structured Portfolio
    74â†’â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ /template
    75â†’â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ layout.html      # Single sacred layout: dark gallery
    76â†’â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ prompt-card.html # Individual prompt component
    77â†’â”‚   â”‚   â””â”€â”€ styles.css       # Locked typography, spacing, color tokens
    78â†’â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ /generator
    79â†’â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ build.js         # Orchestrates HTML + CSS + JS write to disk
    80â†’â”‚   â”‚   â””â”€â”€ og-image.js      # Generates OG PNG at portfolio creation
    81â†’â”‚   â””â”€â”€ /deploy
    82â†’â”‚       â””â”€â”€ cdn-push.js      # Uploads static bundle to CDN, returns URL
    83â†’â”śâ”€â”€ /app
    84â†’â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ index.html           # Landing page: single upload drop-zone
    85â†’â”‚   â””â”€â”€ main.js              # Landing page logic (drop-zone, validation)
    86â†’â”śâ”€â”€ /public
    87â†’â”‚   â””â”€â”€ assets               # Static assets (fonts, favicon, base CSS)
    88â†’â”śâ”€â”€ /lib
    89â†’â”‚   â””â”€â”€ utils.js             # Shared utilities (UUID, validation, base64)
    90â†’â”śâ”€â”€ package.json             # Minimal dependencies; no React
    91â†’â””â”€â”€ README.md
    92â†’```
    93â†’
    94â†’### Build Output (per Portfolio)
    95â†’
    96â†’```
    97â†’/{uuid}/
    98â†’  â”śâ”€â”€ index.html              # Portfolio page
    99â†’  â”śâ”€â”€ og-image.png            # Pre-generated social card
   100â†’  â””â”€â”€ assets/
   101â†’      â”śâ”€â”€ images/             # Extracted base64 images from export
   102â†’      â””â”€â”€ styles.css          # Minified, locked styles
   103â†’```
   104â†’
   105â†’### Data Flow
   106â†’
   107â†’1. User lands on `index.html` â€” single, obvious file upload drop-zone for Claude JSON export.
   108â†’2. User drops Claude export JSON â†’ client-side parser validates and extracts prompts (max 5 MB).
   109â†’3. Base64 images extracted and converted to binary files.
   110â†’4. Static generator renders HTML + CSS bundle using sacred template.
   111â†’5. OG image (PNG) generated at build time using Sharp/Satori.
   112â†’6. Static bundle uploaded to CDN.
   113â†’7. Shareable HTTPS URL returned to user instantly.
   114â†’8. Public portfolio page at `/{uuid}/index.html` with pre-generated `og-image.png`.
   115â†’
   116â†’### Parser Resilience
   117â†’
   118â†’- `claude.js` wrapped in `try/catch` with graceful error message.
   119â†’- Layered extraction: `JSON.parse()` â†’ regex strip markdown fences â†’ regex extract first `{...}` block â†’ WP_Error-style fallback.
   120â†’- If Claude export schema drifts, render as raw text blocks rather than crashing.
   121â†’- 5 MB file size cap enforced before parsing begins.
   122â†’- Only Claude parser in v1.
   123â†’
   124â†’---
   125â†’
   126â†’## Verification Criteria
   127â†’
   128â†’| Requirement | How to Prove It Works |
   129â†’|-------------|----------------------|
   130â†’| **Project boots** | `cd promptfolio && npm install` completes without errors |
   131â†’| **Parser handles valid JSON** | `tests/test-parser.sh` with valid Claude export returns parsed object |
   132â†’| **Parser handles markdown fences** | Test input with \`\`\`json fences strips and parses correctly |
   133â†’| **Parser handles truncated JSON** | Test returns graceful error, not crash |
   134â†’| **Parser handles empty file** | Test returns "No prompts found" error |
   135â†’| **Parser enforces 5 MB cap** | Test with >5 MB file returns "File exceeds 5 MB limit" |
   136â†’| **Base64 images extracted** | Output HTML contains no `data:image/` strings; images exist as files |
   137â†’| **Single template rendered** | `grep -c "sacred dark gallery" output/index.html` = 1 |
   138â†’| **OG image exists** | `test -f output/og-image.png` exits 0; file is valid PNG under 500KB |
   139â†’| **Dark mode only** | `grep -riE "light-mode|light_mode|prefers-color-scheme:\s*light" src/` returns zero matches |
   140â†’| **No toggle logic** | `grep -ri "toggle\|theme-switch\|light.*dark" src/` returns zero matches |
   141â†’| **Static pages generated** | `ls output/{uuid}/index.html` exists after build |
   142â†’| **OG tags present** | `grep -o '<meta property="og:' output/index.html` returns at least 3 tags |
   143â†’| **CDN push returns HTTPS URL** | URL starts with `https://` and matches `{uuid}.{cdn-domain}` pattern |
   144â†’| **Anonymous access works** | `curl -I {url}` returns 200 without `WWW-Authenticate` header |
   145â†’| **30-second flow** | End-to-end timing: upload â†’ parse â†’ generate â†’ deploy â†’ URL in <30s |
   146â†’| **No banned patterns** | `tests/test-exclusions.sh` exits 0 |
   147â†’| **No "Try This Prompt" widget** | `grep -riE "try.*prompt|tryprompt|execute.*prompt" src/ app/` returns zero |
   148â†’| **No barnacles** | `grep -riE "newsletter|popup|chatbot|cookie.*banner|seo.*wizard" src/ app/` returns zero |
   149â†’| **No WordPress plugin** | `find . -name "*.php"` returns nothing |
   150â†’| **No manual paste UI** | `grep -riE "manual.*paste|paste.*input|markdown.*input" app/` returns zero |
   151â†’| **No auth/database** | `grep -riE "prisma|drizzle|auth|login|register|session|user\." src/ lib/` returns zero |
   152â†’| **No React/Next.js** | `grep -ri "next\\|react" package.json` returns nothing (or only dev deps) |
   153â†’| **Bundle under 500KB** | `du -sh output/` shows under 500KB total |
   154â†’| **Mobile responsive** | Page renders without horizontal scroll at 375px viewport |
   155â†’| **No corporate speak** | `grep -ri "leverage\|solution\|empower" src/ app/` returns zero matches |
   156â†’
   157â†’---
   158â†’
   159â†’## Files to Create or Modify
   160â†’
   161â†’### Configuration & Tooling
   162â†’| File | Purpose |
   163â†’|------|---------|
   164â†’| `promptfolio/package.json` | Minimal dependencies: sharp (OG images), no React, no heavy framework |
   165â†’| `promptfolio/.gitignore` | Standard Node ignores: `node_modules/`, `dist/`, `*.log`, `.env` |
   166â†’
   167â†’### Parser Module
   168â†’| File | Purpose |
   169â†’|------|---------|
   170â†’| `src/parser/claude.js` | Claude export JSON â†’ Portfolio domain schema. Defensive validation + raw-text fallback. |
   171â†’| `src/parser/schema.js` | JSON schema definition for valid Claude export structure. |
   172â†’
   173â†’### Template Module
   174â†’| File | Purpose |
   175â†’|------|---------|
   176â†’| `src/template/layout.html` | Single sacred layout: dark gallery, sacred whitespace, typography-forward. |
   177â†’| `src/template/prompt-card.html` | Individual prompt component: the painting on the wall. |
   178â†’| `src/template/styles.css` | Locked typography, spacing, color tokens (dark only). Under 200 lines. |
   179â†’
   180â†’### Generator Module
   181â†’| File | Purpose |
   182â†’|------|---------|
   183â†’| `src/generator/build.js` | Orchestrates HTML + CSS + JS write to disk/bundle. |
   184â†’| `src/generator/og-image.js` | Generates OG PNG at portfolio creation time using Sharp/Satori. |
   185â†’
   186â†’### Deploy Module
   187â†’| File | Purpose |
   188â†’|------|---------|
   189â†’| `src/deploy/cdn-push.js` | Uploads static bundle to CDN, returns shareable HTTPS URL. |
   190â†’
   191â†’### Landing Page
   192â†’| File | Purpose |
   193â†’|------|---------|
   194â†’| `app/index.html` | Landing page: single upload drop-zone, no nav, no settings. |
   195â†’| `app/main.js` | Landing page logic: drop-zone, file validation, progress indicator. |
   196â†’
   197â†’### Utilities
   198â†’| File | Purpose |
   199â†’|------|---------|
   200â†’| `lib/utils.js` | Shared utilities: UUID gen, validation helpers, base64 decode. |
   201â†’
   202â†’### Documentation
   203â†’| File | Purpose |
   204â†’|------|---------|
   205â†’| `README.md` | Three-paragraph readme: what it does, how it works, built-in agents. |
   206â†’
   207â†’### Tests (in Deliverables)
   208â†’| File | Purpose |
   209â†’|------|---------|
   210â†’| `deliverables/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-91/tests/test-parser.sh` | Verify parser handles valid/invalid input correctly. |
   211â†’| `deliverables/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-91/tests/test-generator.sh` | Verify generator output contains expected files and structure. |
   212â†’| `deliverables/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-91/tests/test-exclusions.sh` | Verify no light-mode, no widget, no barnacles, no banned patterns. |
   213â†’| `deliverables/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-91/tests/test-aesthetic.sh` | Verify aesthetic checklist: whitespace, typography, motion, mobile. |
   214â†’| `deliverables/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-91/tests/test-e2e.sh` | End-to-end flow test: upload â†’ generate â†’ deploy â†’ verify URL. |
   215â†’
   216â†’---
   217â†’
   218â†’## Out of Scope (Locked Decisions)
   219â†’
   220â†’The following must **not** appear in v1:
   221â†’
   222â†’| Excluded | Locked Decision |
   223â†’|----------|-----------------|
   224â†’| Light mode toggle or light-mode-specific styles | #4, #16 |
   225â†’| ChatGPT/OpenAI/Gemini JSON import | #6 |
   226â†’| Manual markdown/JSON paste input | #7 (single file drop-zone only) |
   227â†’| "Try This Prompt" widget / interactive inference | #5 |
   228â†’| WordPress plugin architecture | #1 (static SaaS) |
   229â†’| Multiple templates or theming system | #3, #17 |
   230â†’| Font picker / color picker / theme picker / customizer | #3, #17 |
   231â†’| SEO wizards, newsletter widgets, popup chatbots, cookie banners | #14 |
   232â†’| Forced watermark or "Made with Promptfolio" backlink | #10 |
   233â†’| User accounts / auth / login / database | #13 |
   234â†’| Multi-step onboarding wizard / tutorial / tooltips | #18 |
   235â†’| Analytics dashboard / view counters | #14 |
   236â†’| Workflows / case studies taxonomies | #15 |
   237â†’| React / Next.js build pipeline | #19 |
   238â†’
   239â†’---
   240â†’
   241â†’## Open Questions (To Resolve Before Build)
   242â†’
   243â†’1. **Final folder/repo name** â€” "Promptfolio" is product name; confirm directory name matches.
   244â†’2. **OG generation mechanics** â€” Sharp vs. Satori for PNG generation.
   245â†’3. **Hosting/CDN target** â€” Cloudflare Pages, Vercel, or Netlify for free tier.
   246â†’4. **Export discoverability copy** â€” Exact wording for helper: "Claude â†’ Settings â†’ Data â†’ Export".
   247â†’5. **Orphan URL cleanup** â€” Manual support channel vs. TTL auto-purge policy.
   248â†’6. **Image extraction cap** â€” Maximum images per portfolio to bound bundle size.
   249â†’7. **Framework escape hatch** â€” Plain Node.js file-writing if any framework blocks single-session ship.
   250â†’
   251â†’---
   252â†’
   253â†’## Acceptance Criteria (from PRD)
   254â†’
   255â†’- [ ] Issue sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#91 requirements are met
   256â†’- [ ] All tests pass
   257â†’- [ ] 30-second upload-to-URL flow works end-to-end
   258â†’- [ ] Claude export import works with real export files
   259â†’- [ ] OG images display correctly when shared on Twitter/Slack/LinkedIn
   260â†’- [ ] Dark mode renders correctly on mobile and desktop
   261â†’- [ ] No barnacles shipped
   262â†’- [ ] Bundle size under 500KB
   263â†’- [ ] Zero React/Next.js dependencies
   264â†’- [ ] Client-side parsing with 5 MB cap enforced
   265â†’

<system-reminder>

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

# Promptfolio â€” Build Specification

**Issue:** sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#91
**Source PRD:** `prds/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-91.md`
**Locked Decisions:** `rounds/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-91/decisions.md`
**Product Name:** Promptfolio (per locked decision #2)
**Version:** 1.0 (MVP)
**Architecture:** Static SaaS â€” zero backend, no auth, no database

---

## Goals

From the PRD and locked debate decisions:

1. **Static SaaS Portfolio Generator** â€” Build a lightweight Node.js-based generator that transforms Claude conversation export JSON files into stunning, gallery-grade portfolio websites. No React SPA, no heavy build pipeline (per locked decision #19).

2. **One-Click Claude Import** â€” Single file drop-zone for Claude conversation export JSON ONLY. No ChatGPT, no manual paste in v1 (per locked decision #6).

3. **One Sacred Template** â€” Single "dark gallery" template with hero prompt display, elegant typography, and locked design tokens. No theme marketplace, no font picker, no color picker (per locked decision #3).

4. **Dark Mode Only** â€” Midnight gallery palette. No light mode toggle, no light-mode styles (per locked decision #4, #16).

5. **Auto-Generated OG Images** â€” Every portfolio generates a pre-rendered PNG social card at build time (per locked decision #9).

6. **Static CDN-Hosted Pages** â€” Public portfolios served as static HTML/CSS/JS bundles. Zero database reads, zero server-side rendering per-request.

7. **30-Second Resurrection Standard** â€” Upload Claude export â†’ instant beautiful URL in under 30 seconds (per locked decision #10).

8. **No Forced Watermark** â€” No "Made with Promptfolio" backlinks. Viral loop via organic pride, not obligation (per locked decision #10).

9. **No "Try This Prompt" Widget** â€” Explicitly cut. API keys, rate limits, abuse vectors are all liability (per locked decision #5).

10. **No Barnacles** â€” Cut SEO wizards, newsletter widgets, popup chatbots, analytics dashboards, onboarding tutorials (per locked decision #14, #17, #18).

---

## Implementation Approach

### Architecture Lock (from decisions.md)

| Decision | Resolution |
|----------|------------|
| **Static SaaS** | One file in (Claude JSON), one URL out, CDN-hosted. No DB, no auth, no server-side rendering in v1. |
| **Product Name** | Promptfolio â€” locked in decision #2. |
| **No React Pipeline** | No Next.js, no heavy SPA toolchain. Lightweight static generator only (vanilla Node.js, Astro, or 11ty) per decision #19. |
| **One Sacred Template** | No theme marketplace. No font picker. No color picker. One midnight gallery palette. |
| **Dark Mode Only** | Not a toggle. The air the gallery breathes. |
| **Claude Import Only** | ChatGPT, OpenAI, Gemini exports are v2. |
| **Client-Side Parsing** | Browser-based parsing with 5 MB cap. Web Workers for off-main-thread processing. |
| **OG Images Pre-Generated** | Generate during build pipeline using Sharp or Satori, not edge-rendered per-request. |
| **No Forced Watermark** | Beauty must compel sharing. Apostles, not hostages. |
| **No Widget** | "Try this prompt" widget is barnacles. |
| **Base64 Image Extraction** | Decode base64 images from exports, convert to static files, reference in HTML. |
| **Self-Evident Affordance** | No multi-step wizard. Single obvious upload action. One-line helper text max. |

### Tech Stack

- **Runtime:** Node.js 18+ (native fetch)
- **Framework:** None (vanilla Node.js file-writing) OR Astro 4.x (lightweight, no React SPA)
- **Styling:** Vanilla CSS with locked design tokens (dark mode only)
- **Validation:** Custom schema validation in parser
- **OG Images:** Sharp or Satori (SVGâ†’PNG, pre-generated at build time)
- **Data Persistence:** None in v1 â€” pure static generation from uploaded JSON
- **Deployment:** Cloudflare Pages, Vercel, or Netlify (free tier, instant deploy)

### File Structure

```
/promptfolio
â”śâ”€â”€ /src
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ /parser
â”‚   â”‚   â””â”€â”€ claude.js        # Claude export JSON â†’ structured Portfolio
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ /template
â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ layout.html      # Single sacred layout: dark gallery
â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ prompt-card.html # Individual prompt component
â”‚   â”‚   â””â”€â”€ styles.css       # Locked typography, spacing, color tokens
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ /generator
â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ build.js         # Orchestrates HTML + CSS + JS write to disk
â”‚   â”‚   â””â”€â”€ og-image.js      # Generates OG PNG at portfolio creation
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ /deploy
â”‚       â””â”€â”€ cdn-push.js      # Uploads static bundle to CDN, returns URL
â”śâ”€â”€ /app
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ index.html           # Landing page: single upload drop-zone
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ main.js              # Landing page logic (drop-zone, validation)
â”śâ”€â”€ /public
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ assets               # Static assets (fonts, favicon, base CSS)
â”śâ”€â”€ /lib
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ utils.js             # Shared utilities (UUID, validation, base64)
â”śâ”€â”€ package.json             # Minimal dependencies; no React
â””â”€â”€ README.md
```

### Build Output (per Portfolio)

```
/{uuid}/
  â”śâ”€â”€ index.html              # Portfolio page
  â”śâ”€â”€ og-image.png            # Pre-generated social card
  â””â”€â”€ assets/
      â”śâ”€â”€ images/             # Extracted base64 images from export
      â””â”€â”€ styles.css          # Minified, locked styles
```

### Data Flow

1. User lands on `index.html` â€” single, obvious file upload drop-zone for Claude JSON export.
2. User drops Claude export JSON â†’ client-side parser validates and extracts prompts (max 5 MB).
3. Base64 images extracted and converted to binary files.
4. Static generator renders HTML + CSS bundle using sacred template.
5. OG image (PNG) generated at build time using Sharp/Satori.
6. Static bundle uploaded to CDN.
7. Shareable HTTPS URL returned to user instantly.
8. Public portfolio page at `/{uuid}/index.html` with pre-generated `og-image.png`.

### Parser Resilience

- `claude.js` wrapped in `try/catch` with graceful error message.
- Layered extraction: `JSON.parse()` â†’ regex strip markdown fences â†’ regex extract first `{...}` block â†’ WP_Error-style fallback.
- If Claude export schema drifts, render as raw text blocks rather than crashing.
- 5 MB file size cap enforced before parsing begins.
- Only Claude parser in v1.

---

## Verification Criteria

| Requirement | How to Prove It Works |
|-------------|----------------------|
| **Project boots** | `cd promptfolio && npm install` completes without errors |
| **Parser handles valid JSON** | `tests/test-parser.sh` with valid Claude export returns parsed object |
| **Parser handles markdown fences** | Test input with \`\`\`json fences strips and parses correctly |
| **Parser handles truncated JSON** | Test returns graceful error, not crash |
| **Parser handles empty file** | Test returns "No prompts found" error |
| **Parser enforces 5 MB cap** | Test with >5 MB file returns "File exceeds 5 MB limit" |
| **Base64 images extracted** | Output HTML contains no `data:image/` strings; images exist as files |
| **Single template rendered** | `grep -c "sacred dark gallery" output/index.html` = 1 |
| **OG image exists** | `test -f output/og-image.png` exits 0; file is valid PNG under 500KB |
| **Dark mode only** | `grep -riE "light-mode|light_mode|prefers-color-scheme:\s*light" src/` returns zero matches |
| **No toggle logic** | `grep -ri "toggle\|theme-switch\|light.*dark" src/` returns zero matches |
| **Static pages generated** | `ls output/{uuid}/index.html` exists after build |
| **OG tags present** | `grep -o '<meta property="og:' output/index.html` returns at least 3 tags |
| **CDN push returns HTTPS URL** | URL starts with `https://` and matches `{uuid}.{cdn-domain}` pattern |
| **Anonymous access works** | `curl -I {url}` returns 200 without `WWW-Authenticate` header |
| **30-second flow** | End-to-end timing: upload â†’ parse â†’ generate â†’ deploy â†’ URL in <30s |
| **No banned patterns** | `tests/test-exclusions.sh` exits 0 |
| **No "Try This Prompt" widget** | `grep -riE "try.*prompt|tryprompt|execute.*prompt" src/ app/` returns zero |
| **No barnacles** | `grep -riE "newsletter|popup|chatbot|cookie.*banner|seo.*wizard" src/ app/` returns zero |
| **No WordPress plugin** | `find . -name "*.php"` returns nothing |
| **No manual paste UI** | `grep -riE "manual.*paste|paste.*input|markdown.*input" app/` returns zero |
| **No auth/database** | `grep -riE "prisma|drizzle|auth|login|register|session|user\." src/ lib/` returns zero |
| **No React/Next.js** | `grep -ri "next\\|react" package.json` returns nothing (or only dev deps) |
| **Bundle under 500KB** | `du -sh output/` shows under 500KB total |
| **Mobile responsive** | Page renders without horizontal scroll at 375px viewport |
| **No corporate speak** | `grep -ri "leverage\|solution\|empower" src/ app/` returns zero matches |

---

## Files to Create or Modify

### Configuration & Tooling
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `promptfolio/package.json` | Minimal dependencies: sharp (OG images), no React, no heavy framework |
| `promptfolio/.gitignore` | Standard Node ignores: `node_modules/`, `dist/`, `*.log`, `.env` |

### Parser Module
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `src/parser/claude.js` | Claude export JSON â†’ Portfolio domain schema. Defensive validation + raw-text fallback. |
| `src/parser/schema.js` | JSON schema definition for valid Claude export structure. |

### Template Module
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `src/template/layout.html` | Single sacred layout: dark gallery, sacred whitespace, typography-forward. |
| `src/template/prompt-card.html` | Individual prompt component: the painting on the wall. |
| `src/template/styles.css` | Locked typography, spacing, color tokens (dark only). Under 200 lines. |

### Generator Module
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `src/generator/build.js` | Orchestrates HTML + CSS + JS write to disk/bundle. |
| `src/generator/og-image.js` | Generates OG PNG at portfolio creation time using Sharp/Satori. |

### Deploy Module
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `src/deploy/cdn-push.js` | Uploads static bundle to CDN, returns shareable HTTPS URL. |

### Landing Page
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `app/index.html` | Landing page: single upload drop-zone, no nav, no settings. |
| `app/main.js` | Landing page logic: drop-zone, file validation, progress indicator. |

### Utilities
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `lib/utils.js` | Shared utilities: UUID gen, validation helpers, base64 decode. |

### Documentation
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `README.md` | Three-paragraph readme: what it does, how it works, built-in agents. |

### Tests (in Deliverables)
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `deliverables/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-91/tests/test-parser.sh` | Verify parser handles valid/invalid input correctly. |
| `deliverables/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-91/tests/test-generator.sh` | Verify generator output contains expected files and structure. |
| `deliverables/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-91/tests/test-exclusions.sh` | Verify no light-mode, no widget, no barnacles, no banned patterns. |
| `deliverables/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-91/tests/test-aesthetic.sh` | Verify aesthetic checklist: whitespace, typography, motion, mobile. |
| `deliverables/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-91/tests/test-e2e.sh` | End-to-end flow test: upload â†’ generate â†’ deploy â†’ verify URL. |

---

## Out of Scope (Locked Decisions)

The following must **not** appear in v1:

| Excluded | Locked Decision |
|----------|-----------------|
| Light mode toggle or light-mode-specific styles | #4, #16 |
| ChatGPT/OpenAI/Gemini JSON import | #6 |
| Manual markdown/JSON paste input | #7 (single file drop-zone only) |
| "Try This Prompt" widget / interactive inference | #5 |
| WordPress plugin architecture | #1 (static SaaS) |
| Multiple templates or theming system | #3, #17 |
| Font picker / color picker / theme picker / customizer | #3, #17 |
| SEO wizards, newsletter widgets, popup chatbots, cookie banners | #14 |
| Forced watermark or "Made with Promptfolio" backlink | #10 |
| User accounts / auth / login / database | #13 |
| Multi-step onboarding wizard / tutorial / tooltips | #18 |
| Analytics dashboard / view counters | #14 |
| Workflows / case studies taxonomies | #15 |
| React / Next.js build pipeline | #19 |

---

## Open Questions (To Resolve Before Build)

1. **Final folder/repo name** â€” "Promptfolio" is product name; confirm directory name matches.
2. **OG generation mechanics** â€” Sharp vs. Satori for PNG generation.
3. **Hosting/CDN target** â€” Cloudflare Pages, Vercel, or Netlify for free tier.
4. **Export discoverability copy** â€” Exact wording for helper: "Claude â†’ Settings â†’ Data â†’ Export".
5. **Orphan URL cleanup** â€” Manual support channel vs. TTL auto-purge policy.
6. **Image extraction cap** â€” Maximum images per portfolio to bound bundle size.
7. **Framework escape hatch** â€” Plain Node.js file-writing if any framework blocks single-session ship.

---

## Acceptance Criteria (from PRD)

- [ ] Issue sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#91 requirements are met
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] 30-second upload-to-URL flow works end-to-end
- [ ] Claude export import works with real export files
- [ ] OG images display correctly when shared on Twitter/Slack/LinkedIn
- [ ] Dark mode renders correctly on mobile and desktop
- [ ] No barnacles shipped
- [ ] Bundle size under 500KB
- [ ] Zero React/Next.js dependencies
- [ ] Client-side parsing with 5 MB cap enforced

1â†’/**
     2â†’ * OG Image Generator
     3â†’ *
     4â†’ * Generates pre-rendered PNG social cards for portfolios using Sharp.
     5â†’ * Creates elegant, dark-mode social sharing images.
     6â†’ */
     7â†’
     8â†’import sharp from 'sharp';
     9â†’import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';
    10â†’import { dirname, join } from 'path';
    11â†’import { mkdir, writeFile } from 'fs/promises';
    12â†’
    13â†’const __dirname = dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
    14â†’
    15â†’const OG_WIDTH = 1200;
    16â†’const OG_HEIGHT = 630;
    17â†’
    18â†’/**
    19â†’ * Generates an OG image for a portfolio
    20â†’ * @param {Object} portfolio - Portfolio data
    21â†’ * @param {string} outputPath - Path to write the PNG
    22â†’ * @returns {Promise<string>} Path to generated image
    23â†’ */
    24â†’export async function generateOGImage(portfolio, outputPath) {
    25â†’  // Ensure output directory exists
    26â†’  const outputDir = dirname(outputPath);
    27â†’  await mkdir(outputDir, { recursive: true });
    28â†’
    29â†’  // Create SVG content for the OG image
    30â†’  const svg = createOGImageSVG(portfolio);
    31â†’
    32â†’  // Convert SVG to PNG using Sharp
    33â†’  const pngBuffer = await sharp(Buffer.from(svg))
    34â†’    .png()
    35â†’    .toBuffer();
    36â†’
    37â†’  await writeFile(outputPath, pngBuffer);
    38â†’
    39â†’  return outputPath;
    40â†’}
    41â†’
    42â†’/**
    43â†’ * Creates SVG markup for the OG image
    44â†’ * @param {Object} portfolio
    45â†’ * @returns {string} SVG markup
    46â†’ */
    47â†’function createOGImageSVG(portfolio) {
    48â†’  const title = escapeXml(portfolio.title || 'Portfolio');
    49â†’  const promptCount = portfolio.prompts?.length || 0;
    50â†’  const date = new Date(portfolio.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
    51â†’    year: 'numeric',
    52â†’    month: 'long',
    53â†’    day: 'numeric'
    54â†’  });
    55â†’
    56â†’  return `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
    57â†’<svg width="${OG_WIDTH}" height="${OG_HEIGHT}" viewBox="0 0 ${OG_WIDTH} ${OG_HEIGHT}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    58â†’  <!-- Background -->
    59â†’  <rect width="${OG_WIDTH}" height="${OG_HEIGHT}" fill="#0a0a0f"/>
    60â†’
    61â†’  <!-- Gradient overlay -->
    62â†’  <defs>
    63â†’    <linearGradient id="grad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
    64â†’      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#1a1a24;stop-opacity:0.5"/>
    65â†’      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#0a0a0f;stop-opacity:0"/>
    66â†’    </linearGradient>
    67â†’  </defs>
    68â†’  <rect width="${OG_WIDTH}" height="${OG_HEIGHT}" fill="url(#grad)"/>
    69â†’
    70â†’  <!-- Accent shape -->
    71â†’  <circle cx="${OG_WIDTH - 150}" cy="150" r="100" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.2"/>
    72â†’  <circle cx="150" cy="${OG_HEIGHT - 100}" r="80" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.15"/>
    73â†’
    74â†’  <!-- Title -->
    75â†’  <text x="80" y="280" font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif" font-size="56" font-weight="700" fill="#f5f5f7" letter-spacing="-0.02em">
    76â†’    ${title}
    77â†’  </text>
    78â†’
    79â†’  <!-- Subtitle -->
    80â†’  <text x="80" y="360" font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="#a1a1aa">
    81â†’    ${promptCount} prompts Â· ${date}
    82â†’  </text>
    83â†’
    84â†’  <!-- Branding -->
    85â†’  <text x="80" y="${OG_HEIGHT - 60}" font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif" font-size="20" fill="#71717a" letter-spacing="0.05em">
    86â†’    PROMPTFOLIO
    87â†’  </text>
    88â†’
    89â†’  <!-- Decorative line -->
    90â†’  <line x1="80" y1="400" x2="400" y2="400" stroke="#6366f1" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.6"/>
    91â†’</svg>`;
    92â†’}
    93â†’
    94â†’/**
    95â†’ * Escapes special XML characters
    96â†’ * @param {string} str
    97â†’ * @returns {string}
    98â†’ */
    99â†’function escapeXml(str) {
   100â†’  return str
   101â†’    .replace(/&/g, '&')
   102â†’    .replace(/</g, '<')
   103â†’    .replace(/>/g, '>')
   104â†’    .replace(/"/g, '"')
   105â†’    .replace(/'/g, ''');
   106â†’}
   107â†’
